case_title: ARCELIA PADILLA VS. ZEIDA L. SANCHEZ

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF PADILLA, ARCELIA AS TO DEFENDANT SANCHEZ, ZEIDA L. AN INDIVIDUAL DBA FIVE STAR JANITORIAL SERVICE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
